target_segment: Beta waitlist — PMs who expressed interest

emails.purpose: Teaser: announce V10 is coming with key differentiator (PESTLE analysis)
subject_lines: The feature no PM tool has — until now
Your competitors are using PESTLE. Shouldn't you?
emails.preview_text: ProductOS V10 introduces autonomous PESTLE environmental analysis for PMs.
emails.body: Hi {{first_name}}, in two weeks, ProductOS V10 ships. Here is a quick preview of one capability no other PM tool offers: autonomous PESTLE analysis. Open a product workspace, define your market, and ProductOS generates a 6-factor environmental analysis — political, economic, social, technological, legal, environmental — with 12-month projections and strategy implications. McKinsey-grade analysis. Autonomous. Evidence-backed. More coming next week.

emails.purpose: Value prop: show time savings from beta testers
subject_lines: PMs cut discovery time by 70% — here's how
How Sarah Chen cut her competitive analysis from 4 hours to 4 minutes
emails.preview_text: Real PM results from the ProductOS V10 beta program.
emails.body: Hi {{first_name}}, Sarah Chen, Senior PM at a fintech company, spent 4 hours per competitive analysis. With ProductOS V10, her first AI-generated competitive analysis took 4 minutes. Quality parity: 85%. Her CTO asked for competitive context in a meeting — Sarah had the answer on screen before the CTO finished the question. This is the PM superpower ProductOS V10 delivers. Autonomous. Evidence-backed. Ready when you are.

emails.purpose: Launch: V10 is live with full feature announcement
subject_lines: ProductOS V10 is live — your PM superpowers, automated
V10 Launch: PESTLE. Prototypes. PRDs. Marketing. All autonomous.
emails.preview_text: ProductOS V10 is now available. Start your free trial.
emails.body: Hi {{first_name}}, ProductOS V10 is live. Here is everything shipping today: Autonomous PESTLE environmental analysis with 3-horizon projections. 3-variant interactive HTML prototype generation with WCAG accessibility. Decision intelligence — trade-off analysis, decision trees, sensitivity, premortems. Competitive intelligence automation with continuous radar scanning. Living system — artifacts auto-refresh when underlying data changes. Product Health Dashboard — your entire product universe in one surface. Start your 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
